questionText: Você precisa informar ao cliente que o prazo de entrega do projeto será estendido. Como você comunicaria isso de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: I regret to inform you that we will need to extend the project deadline due to unforeseen circumstances.
options: I regret to inform you that we will need to extend the project deadline due to unforeseen circumstances.
We are sorry but the project will be late because of some problems we had.
The deadline has been pushed back and we apologize for this inconvenience.
Unfortunately, the project cannot be delivered on time as originally planned.

questionText: Em uma reunião de negócios, você quer pedir permissão para fazer uma pergunta ao palestrante. O que você diria?
correctAnswer: If I may, I'd like to raise a point regarding the financial projections.
options: If I may, I'd like to raise a point regarding the financial projections.
Can I ask something about the money numbers?
I want to talk about the projections now.
Sorry, I have a question about finances.

questionText: Você quer agradecer a um parceiro de negócios pelo suporte durante uma negociação difícil. Qual expressão é mais adequada em contexto formal?
correctAnswer: We are deeply grateful for your unwavering support throughout the negotiation process.
options: We are deeply grateful for your unwavering support throughout the negotiation process.
Thanks a lot for helping us in the negotiation.
We appreciate that you were there for us during the talks.
Thank you very much for what you did during the negotiation.

questionText: Você está apresentando os resultados financeiros da empresa e quer indicar uma tendência de crescimento. Qual é a forma mais precisa de expressar isso?
correctAnswer: Our revenue has shown a consistent upward trajectory over the past four quarters.
options: Our revenue has shown a consistent upward trajectory over the past four quarters.
We made more money in the last four quarters.
The company is doing better financially speaking.
Profits went up over the last four months.

questionText: Um colega propõe uma estratégia que você considera arriscada. Como você expressaria discordância de forma diplomática em inglês corporativo?
correctAnswer: While I appreciate your perspective, I have some reservations about the risk exposure involved.
options: While I appreciate your perspective, I have some reservations about the risk exposure involved.
I don't think that's a good idea at all.
Your strategy doesn't make sense from a financial point of view.
I disagree with your proposal because it's too risky.

questionText: Você precisa solicitar a um fornecedor que envie uma proposta revisada com novos preços. Qual é a solicitação mais adequada formalmente?
correctAnswer: Could you please provide us with a revised quotation reflecting the updated pricing structure?
options: Could you please provide us with a revised quotation reflecting the updated pricing structure?
We need you to send new prices as soon as possible.
Please send another proposal with the correct numbers.
Can you give us a new price list when you can?

questionText: Durante uma conferência, você quer chamar a atenção dos participantes para um dado importante no slide. Como faria isso?
correctAnswer: I'd like to draw your attention to the figures highlighted in the bottom right-hand corner of this slide.
options: I'd like to draw your attention to the figures highlighted in the bottom right-hand corner of this slide.
Look at the numbers in the corner of the slide.
Please see the data shown on the slide.
Check out the information at the bottom of this page.

questionText: Você quer encerrar uma reunião de forma profissional e confirmar as próximas etapas. O que diria?
correctAnswer: Let's wrap up here. I'll circulate the minutes along with the agreed action points by end of business today.
options: Let's wrap up here. I'll circulate the minutes along with the agreed action points by end of business today.
OK, the meeting is over. I'll send you the notes later.
We are done. I will email everybody about what we decided.
Let's finish now. I will tell everyone what to do next.

questionText: Você precisa confirmar por escrito que recebeu um contrato assinado e que o processo de integração do fornecedor pode começar. Qual é a forma mais adequada?
correctAnswer: This is to confirm receipt of the signed agreement. We may now proceed with the vendor onboarding process.
options: This is to confirm receipt of the signed agreement. We may now proceed with the vendor onboarding process.
We got the contract. We can start working with the vendor.
Thank you for sending the signed paper. We will begin onboarding now.
The signed document was received. The process with the vendor will start soon.

questionText: Em uma negociação, o outro lado faz uma oferta inicial muito baixa. Como você a rejeita de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: I'm afraid that figure falls considerably short of what we'd be prepared to accept.
options: I'm afraid that figure falls considerably short of what we'd be prepared to accept.
That number is not acceptable for us.
Sorry, but the price is too low and we can't agree.
Your offer is not enough and we need more money.

questionText: Você está em uma reunião e precisa verificar se todos entenderam a nova política de reembolso de despesas. Como faria isso de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: Does everyone have a clear understanding of the revised expense reimbursement policy?
options: Does everyone have a clear understanding of the revised expense reimbursement policy?
Did everyone understand the new rules about expenses?
Is everybody OK with the expense policy changes?
Do you all get the new reimbursement process now?

questionText: Você precisa solicitar ao departamento financeiro uma previsão orçamentária para o próximo trimestre. Qual é a solicitação mais formal e adequada?
correctAnswer: Would it be possible to receive the budget forecast for Q3 at your earliest convenience?
options: Would it be possible to receive the budget forecast for Q3 at your earliest convenience?
Can you send me the budget for next quarter?
I need the financial forecast for Q3 as soon as possible.
Please give me the budget numbers for the next quarter.

questionText: Você quer expressar que sua empresa está comprometida em manter um relacionamento de longo prazo com o cliente. Qual é a forma mais adequada?
correctAnswer: We remain fully committed to fostering a long-term and mutually beneficial partnership with your organization.
options: We remain fully committed to fostering a long-term and mutually beneficial partnership with your organization.
We want to keep working with you for a long time.
Our company is interested in having a good relationship with you.
We hope to do business with you for many years to come.

questionText: Você precisa informar a um investidor que os resultados do trimestre ficaram abaixo do esperado. Como faria de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: I must acknowledge that our Q2 performance fell short of the projected targets.
options: I must acknowledge that our Q2 performance fell short of the projected targets.
Our results this quarter were not very good.
We didn't reach our goals for Q2.
The company did worse than expected in the second quarter.

questionText: Você quer convidar um executivo para participar de uma conferência de negócios como palestrante. Qual é a abordagem mais formal?
correctAnswer: We would be honoured to have you as a keynote speaker at our annual financial leadership summit.
options: We would be honoured to have you as a keynote speaker at our annual financial leadership summit.
Would you like to speak at our business event this year?
We want you to come and talk at our conference.
Can you give a presentation at our annual meeting?

questionText: Você precisa apresentar sua empresa brevemente a um potencial parceiro de negócios durante um evento de networking. Qual abordagem é mais profissional?
correctAnswer: We're a mid-sized consultancy specialising in financial restructuring for emerging market companies.
options: We're a mid-sized consultancy specialising in financial restructuring for emerging market companies.
We are a company that works with finances in developing countries.
Our firm does financial work for businesses in growing markets.
We help businesses in emerging markets with their money problems.

questionText: Você está escrevendo uma proposta comercial e precisa resumir os benefícios principais da sua solução. Como introduziria essa seção?
correctAnswer: The following section outlines the key value drivers underpinning our proposed solution.
options: The following section outlines the key value drivers underpinning our proposed solution.
Here we talk about the good things our solution can do.
Now we will explain the benefits of our offer.
The next part shows you why our solution is good.

questionText: Em uma negociação contratual, você quer sugerir uma cláusula de revisão de preços a cada dois anos. Como expressaria isso de forma técnica e adequada?
correctAnswer: We propose incorporating a biennial price review clause indexed to prevailing market benchmarks.
options: We propose incorporating a biennial price review clause indexed to prevailing market benchmarks.
We suggest checking prices every two years based on the market.
A price update every two years would be a good idea for the contract.
We think prices should be reviewed every couple of years.

questionText: Um cliente expressa insatisfação com os termos do contrato e ameaça encerrar a parceria. Como você responderia de forma a manter o relacionamento sem fazer concessões precipitadas?
correctAnswer: We value our partnership greatly and are open to revisiting certain contractual terms through a structured dialogue.
options: We value our partnership greatly and are open to revisiting certain contractual terms through a structured dialogue.
We understand your concerns and will change the contract if you want.
Don't worry, we can fix this and make the contract better for you.
We hear you and will try to adjust whatever you don't like.

questionText: Você precisa justificar um aumento de preço para um cliente de longa data, citando pressões inflacionárias e aumento nos custos operacionais. Como faria isso?
correctAnswer: In light of sustained inflationary pressures and rising operational costs, we find it necessary to adjust our pricing accordingly.
options: In light of sustained inflationary pressures and rising operational costs, we find it necessary to adjust our pricing accordingly.
Because everything is more expensive now, we need to charge you more.
Due to inflation, our prices have to go up.
We are raising prices because our costs have increased a lot recently.

questionText: Durante uma due diligence, você precisa solicitar documentação financeira adicional de forma precisa e formal. O que diria?
correctAnswer: As part of our due diligence process, we kindly request access to audited financial statements for the past three fiscal years.
options: As part of our due diligence process, we kindly request access to audited financial statements for the past three fiscal years.
We need to see your financial papers from the last three years.
Can you give us your financial documents for due diligence purposes?
Please send us the financial statements from the previous three years.

questionText: Você está conduzindo uma apresentação para investidores e quer discutir a estratégia de saída do investimento. Como introduziria esse ponto?
correctAnswer: I'd now like to turn your attention to the exit strategy, which is central to the return profile of this investment.
options: I'd now like to turn your attention to the exit strategy, which is central to the return profile of this investment.
Now let's talk about how investors can get their money back.
The next topic is how we plan to exit and give returns.
I want to discuss when and how investors can exit this deal.

questionText: Você precisa comunicar a um parceiro de negócios que sua empresa não pode honrar uma cláusula contratual devido a um evento de força maior. Como faria?
correctAnswer: We regret to advise that due to a force majeure event beyond our control, we are temporarily unable to fulfil our obligations under clause 7.3.
options: We regret to advise that due to a force majeure event beyond our control, we are temporarily unable to fulfil our obligations under clause 7.3.
We cannot do what the contract says because something unexpected happened.
Due to circumstances outside our control, we cannot follow the contract right now.
We are sorry but we can't meet our contractual obligations at this time.

questionText: Em uma conferência de imprensa, você precisa comentar sobre uma fusão em andamento sem revelar informações privilegiadas. Como faria?
correctAnswer: While we are unable to disclose specifics at this juncture, I can confirm that we are in advanced discussions that may have material implications for our corporate structure.
options: While we are unable to disclose specifics at this juncture, I can confirm that we are in advanced discussions that may have material implications for our corporate structure.
We can't talk about details now, but there are important negotiations happening.
I cannot say much, but we are in talks that could change the company.
There are some discussions going on but we are not allowed to say anything yet.

questionText: Você quer propor que uma decisão estratégica seja adiada até que mais dados de mercado estejam disponíveis. Como expressaria isso em uma reunião do conselho?
correctAnswer: I would advocate for deferring this decision pending a more comprehensive analysis of current market dynamics.
options: I would advocate for deferring this decision pending a more comprehensive analysis of current market dynamics.
I think we should wait before deciding until we have more market information.
It would be better to hold off on this decision until we know more about the market.
We should postpone the decision because we need more market data first.

questionText: Após uma auditoria interna, você precisa comunicar ao CEO que foram identificadas irregularidades contábeis. Como faria de forma precisa e profissional?
correctAnswer: The internal audit has surfaced certain accounting discrepancies that warrant immediate executive attention and remediation.
options: The internal audit has surfaced certain accounting discrepancies that warrant immediate executive attention and remediation.
The audit found some accounting problems that need to be fixed quickly.
We discovered financial irregularities in the audit that must be addressed.
The internal review showed there are some issues with the accounts that need attention.

questionText: Você está negociando um contrato de fornecimento e quer propor um período de teste com avaliação de desempenho. Como expressaria isso?
correctAnswer: We would like to propose a probationary supply period with predefined KPIs to assess performance before committing to a long-term agreement.
options: We would like to propose a probationary supply period with predefined KPIs to assess performance before committing to a long-term agreement.
We want to try working with you for a while before signing a long contract.
A test period would help us evaluate your performance before we agree to anything long-term.
Can we have a trial period to see how things go before making a final decision?

questionText: Você precisa apresentar uma análise de risco para o conselho de administração de forma concisa. Como iniciaria sua fala?
correctAnswer: This briefing will walk you through the principal risk vectors facing the organisation and the corresponding mitigation strategies.
options: This briefing will walk you through the principal risk vectors facing the organisation and the corresponding mitigation strategies.
I will explain the main risks for the company and what we can do about them.
Today I want to talk about the risks we face and how to deal with them.
This presentation covers the risks to our business and how we plan to manage them.

questionText: Você precisa recusar uma proposta de parceria de forma que não queime pontes. Como responderia por e-mail?
correctAnswer: While we are unable to move forward with this particular proposal at present, we would welcome the opportunity to explore potential collaboration in the future.
options: While we are unable to move forward with this particular proposal at present, we would welcome the opportunity to explore potential collaboration in the future.
We can't accept this proposal but maybe we can work together later.
Unfortunately, this deal doesn't work for us right now, but we remain open.
We are passing on this proposal for now but are interested in future opportunities.

questionText: Você está conduzindo uma negociação salarial e quer fazer uma contraproposta fundamentada no seu valor de mercado. Como faria isso?
correctAnswer: Based on current market benchmarks for comparable roles in this sector, I believe a compensation package in the range of X would be more commensurate with my experience.
options: Based on current market benchmarks for comparable roles in this sector, I believe a compensation package in the range of X would be more commensurate with my experience.
I think I deserve more money because people in similar jobs earn more.
The salary you offered is lower than what others in my position make.
I know that similar roles pay more, so I'd like to negotiate a higher salary.

questionText: Um cliente questiona uma cobrança inesperada na fatura. Você precisa explicar a origem do valor e justificá-lo formalmente. Como responderia?
correctAnswer: The charge in question relates to supplementary services rendered outside the scope of the original service agreement, as detailed in our amended proposal.
options: The charge in question relates to supplementary services rendered outside the scope of the original service agreement, as detailed in our amended proposal.
That extra charge was for additional work we did that wasn't in the original deal.
The fee you're asking about is for services we provided beyond what was agreed.
We added that charge because we did extra work that was not part of the contract.

questionText: Você quer expressar que a empresa está tomando medidas proativas para mitigar o impacto de uma crise financeira global. Como comunicaria isso a stakeholders?
correctAnswer: We have implemented a series of pre-emptive measures to safeguard the organisation's financial resilience in the face of prevailing macroeconomic headwinds.
options: We have implemented a series of pre-emptive measures to safeguard the organisation's financial resilience in the face of prevailing macroeconomic headwinds.
We are taking action to protect the company from the effects of the global financial crisis.
The company has plans in place to deal with the difficult economic conditions.
We are working to minimise the impact of the global financial situation on our business.

questionText: Em uma assembleia de acionistas, você precisa comunicar uma redução nos dividendos deste ano de forma que preserve a confiança dos investidores. Como abordaria isso?
correctAnswer: In the interest of long-term shareholder value, the Board has resolved to reinvest a greater proportion of earnings this year, which will result in a temporary reduction in dividend distribution.
options: In the interest of long-term shareholder value, the Board has resolved to reinvest a greater proportion of earnings this year, which will result in a temporary reduction in dividend distribution.
We decided to pay lower dividends this year so we can invest more money in the company.
The company will give shareholders less money this year because we need to reinvest profits.
Dividends are being cut this year so we can use the money for business growth.

questionText: Você está negociando os termos de um empréstimo com um banco e quer questionar a taxa de juros proposta, citando seu histórico de crédito impecável. Como formularia isso?
correctAnswer: Given our unblemished credit history and the strength of our financial covenants, I would expect the proposed interest rate to reflect a more favourable risk premium.
options: Given our unblemished credit history and the strength of our financial covenants, I would expect the proposed interest rate to reflect a more favourable risk premium.
We have a good credit record so the interest rate should be lower.
Our credit history is very good, so I think the interest rate could be better.
Because we always pay our debts, I believe we deserve a lower interest rate.

questionText: Você recebe um pedido de proposta (RFP) de um cliente corporativo e precisa confirmar o recebimento e indicar o prazo de resposta. Como responderia?
correctAnswer: We acknowledge receipt of your RFP and confirm that our detailed proposal will be submitted within the stipulated ten-business-day window.
options: We acknowledge receipt of your RFP and confirm that our detailed proposal will be submitted within the stipulated ten-business-day window.
We got your RFP and will send our answer within ten business days.
Thank you for the RFP. We will reply with our proposal in the given time.
We received your request for proposal and will respond within the deadline.

questionText: Você está redigindo um memorando interno sobre a reestruturação organizacional e precisa comunicar redundâncias de cargos de forma sensível e profissional. Qual formulação é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Following a comprehensive organisational review, certain roles have been identified as redundant in the context of the new operational framework, and affected employees will be individually briefed.
options: Following a comprehensive organisational review, certain roles have been identified as redundant in the context of the new operational framework, and affected employees will be individually briefed.
After reviewing the company structure, some positions will be eliminated and employees will be notified.
The restructuring means some jobs are no longer needed and those people will be informed separately.
We have reviewed the organisation and found that some roles are no longer necessary due to the changes.

questionText: Em uma negociação de M&A, a outra parte insiste em uma avaliação de empresa baseada em múltiplos de EBITDA que você considera superestimados. Como você contesta tecnicamente e de forma persuasiva?
correctAnswer: The EBITDA multiples your team is applying do not adequately account for the target's elevated leverage ratio and the cyclical nature of its core revenue streams, which materially erodes the implied valuation.
options: The EBITDA multiples your team is applying do not adequately account for the target's elevated leverage ratio and the cyclical nature of its core revenue streams, which materially erodes the implied valuation.
Your EBITDA calculation is too high because the company has a lot of debt and inconsistent revenues.
The valuation seems inflated because you are not considering the debt and irregular income of the company.
I think the EBITDA multiples are too high given the company's financial profile and revenue volatility.

questionText: O CFO da sua empresa precisa comunicar ao conselho que a empresa está tecnicamente em descumprimento de um covenant financeiro com o banco credor. Como ele formularia isso com precisão técnica?
correctAnswer: I must inform the Board that the Company has breached its net debt-to-EBITDA covenant as of the most recent testing date, and we are in active dialogue with our lending syndicate regarding a potential waiver.
options: I must inform the Board that the Company has breached its net debt-to-EBITDA covenant as of the most recent testing date, and we are in active dialogue with our lending syndicate regarding a potential waiver.
The company has broken a covenant with the bank and we are talking to them to sort it out.
We failed to meet a financial requirement set by our lenders and are negotiating a solution.
The company did not meet the debt covenant condition and we need to speak with the bank to fix it.

questionText: Você é advogado de uma empresa e precisa comunicar a contraparte em uma disputa comercial que sua cliente rejeita a cláusula de arbitragem e prefere litigar na jurisdição original do contrato. Como redigiria isso?
correctAnswer: Our client expressly reserves the right to pursue its claims through the courts of the contractually designated jurisdiction and declines to submit to the arbitration clause as invoked by your client.
options: Our client expressly reserves the right to pursue its claims through the courts of the contractually designated jurisdiction and declines to submit to the arbitration clause as invoked by your client.
Our client does not want arbitration and prefers to go to court in the country specified in the contract.
We reject the arbitration process and will take this case to the court mentioned in the contract.
Our client refuses arbitration and will instead take legal action in the jurisdiction agreed in the contract.

questionText: Durante uma apresentação para analistas de mercado, você precisa comentar sobre a exposição cambial da empresa e as estratégias de hedge utilizadas sem fornecer guidance específico. Como faria?
correctAnswer: Our treasury function employs a range of derivative instruments to hedge a substantial portion of our transactional currency exposure, though I am not in a position to provide forward-looking guidance on specific hedge ratios at this time.
options: Our treasury function employs a range of derivative instruments to hedge a substantial portion of our transactional currency exposure, though I am not in a position to provide forward-looking guidance on specific hedge ratios at this time.
We use financial instruments to protect against currency risk but cannot give specific figures right now.
The company hedges its currency exposure but I can't give details about our strategy today.
We have hedging strategies in place for currency risk but are unable to provide specific guidance currently.

questionText: Você está redigindo uma cláusula de representações e garantias em um contrato de compra e venda de empresa. Como expressaria que o vendedor declara não ter passivos contingentes não divulgados?
correctAnswer: The Seller represents and warrants that, to the best of its knowledge, there are no undisclosed contingent liabilities that could reasonably be expected to have a Material Adverse Effect on the Business.
options: The Seller represents and warrants that, to the best of its knowledge, there are no undisclosed contingent liabilities that could reasonably be expected to have a Material Adverse Effect on the Business.
The seller confirms that there are no hidden liabilities that could negatively affect the business.
The seller states that they have not hidden any financial obligations that could harm the company's value.
The seller guarantees that no undisclosed debts or obligations exist that could damage the business.

questionText: Em uma negociação de reestruturação de dívida, você representa a empresa devedora e quer propor um haircut aos credores sem parecer estar declarando insolvência. Como abordaria isso?
correctAnswer: In order to preserve the long-term viability of the business and protect creditor recoveries, we are proposing a consensual debt restructuring that would involve a partial reduction in the principal outstanding.
options: In order to preserve the long-term viability of the business and protect creditor recoveries, we are proposing a consensual debt restructuring that would involve a partial reduction in the principal outstanding.
We want to reduce the amount of debt we owe as part of a restructuring plan to keep the company going.
We are proposing to pay back less than what we owe to creditors so the company can survive.
The company needs a debt reduction and we hope creditors will agree to accept less money back.

questionText: Você é um gestor de investimentos apresentando a um comitê de risco a justificativa para incluir ativos alternativos ilíquidos na carteira de um fundo de pensão. Como argumentaria?
correctAnswer: Given the fund's long investment horizon and its ability to absorb short-term liquidity constraints, an allocation to illiquid alternative assets is justified by the illiquidity premium they offer relative to public market equivalents.
options: Given the fund's long investment horizon and the ability to absorb short-term liquidity constraints, an allocation to illiquid alternative assets is justified by the illiquidity premium they offer relative to public market equivalents.
The pension fund can invest in illiquid assets because it doesn't need the money quickly and these assets pay more.
Because the fund is long-term and doesn't need immediate access to cash, we can invest in illiquid assets for higher returns.
Illiquid investments make sense for a pension fund because of the higher returns and the long-term nature of the fund.

questionText: Você precisa comunicar a um regulador financeiro que sua empresa identificou e corrigiu uma falha nos controles internos antes que qualquer dano financeiro ocorresse. Como faria de forma que inspire confiança regulatória?
correctAnswer: We wish to apprise you of an internal control deficiency that was independently identified through our enhanced monitoring framework and has since been fully remediated prior to any adverse financial impact materialising.
options: We wish to apprise you of an internal control deficiency that was independently identified through our enhanced monitoring framework and has since been fully remediated prior to any adverse financial impact materialising.
We found and fixed an internal control problem before any financial damage occurred and are informing you.
We identified a control weakness and corrected it before it caused any financial harm.
We are reporting that we found and resolved an internal control issue before it led to any financial losses.

questionText: Você está conduzindo uma negociação de licenciamento de patente e a outra parte recusa a cláusula de não sublicenciamento. Como responderia de forma firme mas aberta ao diálogo?
correctAnswer: The non-sublicensing provision is a core element of our IP protection strategy, though we remain open to discussing carve-outs for specific use cases under clearly defined parameters.
options: The non-sublicensing provision is a core element of our IP protection strategy, though we remain open to discussing carve-outs for specific use cases under clearly defined parameters.
We won't remove the non-sublicensing clause but we could allow exceptions in certain situations.
The clause about sublicensing is very important for us but we can discuss limited exceptions.
We need the non-sublicensing clause but are willing to negotiate specific cases where it wouldn't apply.

questionText: Em uma audiência parlamentar, um executivo bancário precisa responder a críticas sobre práticas de empréstimo predatório sem admitir culpa. Como formularia uma resposta defensiva mas construtiva?
correctAnswer: We take these concerns with the utmost seriousness and have already commissioned an independent review of our retail lending practices to ensure full compliance with the spirit and letter of applicable consumer protection legislation.
options: We take these concerns with the utmost seriousness and have already commissioned an independent review of our retail lending practices to ensure full compliance with the spirit and letter of applicable consumer protection legislation.
We are taking the criticism seriously and have asked for an independent review of our lending practices.
We understand the concerns and are reviewing our lending practices to make sure we follow consumer protection laws.
These are serious allegations and we are conducting a review of how we offer loans to customers.

questionText: Você é o diretor financeiro e precisa apresentar ao conselho a necessidade de uma emissão de dívida subordinada para financiar uma aquisição estratégica, explicando o impacto na estrutura de capital. Como comunicaria isso?
correctAnswer: The proposed subordinated debt issuance will optimise our capital structure by leveraging the tax shield benefits of debt while preserving equity upside for existing shareholders, though it will temporarily elevate our leverage metrics above our stated target range.
options: The proposed subordinated debt issuance will optimise our capital structure by leveraging the tax shield benefits of debt while preserving equity upside for existing shareholders, though it will temporarily elevate our leverage metrics above our stated target range.
Issuing subordinated debt is good for tax purposes and lets shareholders keep their equity stake, but it will increase our debt ratios temporarily.
We want to issue subordinated debt because of tax advantages and to avoid diluting shareholders, though our debt levels will rise temporarily.
The debt issuance will benefit the company through tax savings and protect shareholders, but our leverage will go above target for a while.

questionText: Em uma negociação de contrato de derivativo OTC, você precisa comunicar a necessidade de um Credit Support Annex (CSA) para cobrir o risco de contraparte. Como expressaria esse requerimento técnico?
correctAnswer: Prior to executing any OTC derivative transactions, we require that a Credit Support Annex be executed to govern the collateralisation of mark-to-market exposures in accordance with our internal counterparty risk framework.
options: Prior to executing any OTC derivative transactions, we require that a Credit Support Annex be executed to govern the collateralisation of mark-to-market exposures in accordance with our internal counterparty risk framework.
Before trading derivatives, we need a CSA agreement in place to manage collateral and counterparty risk.
We need a Credit Support Annex signed before doing any derivative trades to handle the collateral requirements.
A CSA is required before we can proceed with any derivatives transactions to manage the credit exposure between us.

questionText: Você está apresentando um relatório de análise fundamentalista de uma ação e precisa comunicar que, embora os fundamentos sejam sólidos, a ação está sendo negociada com um prêmio injustificado em relação aos seus pares. Como expressaria sua recomendação?
correctAnswer: Despite the company's robust fundamental profile, the current market premium to peer group multiples is difficult to justify on a discounted cash flow basis, leading us to maintain a neutral stance pending a more attractive entry point.
options: Despite the company's robust fundamental profile, the current market premium to peer group multiples is difficult to justify on a discounted cash flow basis, leading us to maintain a neutral stance pending a more attractive entry point.
The company has good fundamentals but the stock is too expensive compared to peers, so we are neutral on it for now.
Even though the company is doing well, the stock price is too high relative to similar companies, so we are not recommending buying it yet.
The stock has strong fundamentals but trades at a high premium to peers, which makes it hard to recommend at the current price.

questionText: Você é um assessor financeiro e precisa alertar um cliente sobre o risco de concentração excessiva em um único ativo, preservando o relacionamento e sem soar condescendente. Como abordaria isso?
correctAnswer: While I appreciate your conviction in this particular asset, a portfolio allocation of this magnitude to a single position introduces a level of idiosyncratic risk that may be inconsistent with your stated risk tolerance and investment objectives.
options: While I appreciate your conviction in this particular asset, a portfolio allocation of this magnitude to a single position introduces a level of idiosyncratic risk that may be inconsistent with your stated risk tolerance and investment objectives.
Having so much of your portfolio in one asset is risky and may not match your investment goals.
I understand you believe in this asset, but putting so much money in one place creates risks that don't match your risk profile.
Although you are confident about this investment, concentrating so much on one asset increases risk beyond what you said you're comfortable with.

questionText: Você está conduzindo uma call de resultados com analistas e um deles pergunta se a empresa considera realizar uma recompra de ações. Você quer indicar que é uma opção mas sem comprometer um anúncio formal. Como responderia?
correctAnswer: Share buybacks remain within the toolkit of capital allocation options that the Board considers on an ongoing basis; however, any specific programme would be subject to Board approval and disclosed in accordance with applicable market regulations.
options: Share buybacks remain within the toolkit of capital allocation options that the Board considers on an ongoing basis; however, any specific programme would be subject to Board approval and disclosed in accordance with applicable market regulations.
We are looking at the possibility of share buybacks but cannot confirm anything at this stage.
Buybacks are one option we consider but the Board would need to approve and we would follow disclosure rules.
The company is open to buybacks as a use of capital but has not made any decisions yet and would disclose any plans properly.
